name: Matrona of Thessalonica
troparia: (Tone 4) Your lamb, Matrona, O Jesus, cries in a loud voice:* “You, O my Bridegroom, I love; and, seeking You, I undergo martyrdom.* And with You I am crucified and buried in Your baptism,* and I suffer for Your sake that I may reign with You.* And I die on Your behalf that I may live in You.* Receive me as a spotless sacrifice,* sacrificed for You with love.”* Through her intercession in Your mercy save our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 5) You worked with honor for the Master* and steadfastly refused to dishonor Him.* You endured imprisonment and wounds* and even gave your life for Him.* O martyr Matrona, so wise in God,* now pray for those who honor your memory.
